name: MiniClaw Devlog
description: Daily devlog cron — aggregates yesterday's git activity, credits contributors, publishes to GitHub Discussions, mc-blog, mc-substack, and flags mc-reddit weekly digest.

repoDir.description: Path to the git repository to gather activity from (default: ~/.openclaw/projects/miniclaw-os)

githubRepo.description: GitHub owner/repo for Discussions, PRs, issues (default: miniclaw-official/miniclaw-os)

discussionCategory.description: GitHub Discussions category for devlog posts (default: Devlog)

contributorMap.description: Map of git author names to display names (e.g. { 'AugmentedMike': 'Mike', 'claude-coder-bot': 'Claude Coder' })

substackEnabled.description: Whether to cross-post to Substack (default: false)

redditDigestDir.description: Directory to write weekly digest flags (default: ~/.openclaw/miniclaw/USER/devlog/reddit-queue)
